subcodes.first_line: The Shaykh, with lamp in hand, roamed the city's expanse, lamenting the company of demons and beasts, yearning for the fellowship of man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دی شیخ با چراغ همی گشت گرد شهر کز دیو و دد ملولم انسانم آرزوست یک دست جام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @poems and quotation from poetry, @stories; anecdotes, @praise and encouragement
